title: IEC 62304 / ISO 14971 Hazard
description: Field-aligned with crates/mdux-governance/src/lib.rs::Hazard. Relevant to IEC 62304 §7 (Software risk management process) and ISO 14971 §5.4 (Identification of hazards and hazardous situations) — see docs/iec62304/06-risk-management-process.md and docs/iso14971/02-risk-analysis-and-evaluation.md.

description.description: What the hazard is and how software could contribute to it.

controlled_by.description: One or more Requirement ids whose satisfaction controls this hazard. mdux_governance::Hazard::validate() rejects an empty list — every hazard must trace to at least one controlling requirement.
